(a) The department may issue specialty license plates in recognition of the Texas Aerospace Commission. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Aerospace Commission.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of the general revenue fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.610 — Texas Aerospace Commission License Plates

(a) The department may issue specialty license plates in recognition of the Texas Aerospace Commission. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Aerospace Commission.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of the general revenue fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 79, eff. September 1, 2013.*
